User-agent: *
Allow: /
Allow: /download/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /native
# Per-OS binary endpoints are payload routes (return the actual binary
# or a "not yet" page), not content worth indexing. /share/<id> is
# one-shot encrypted ciphertext, indexing it makes no sense either.
Disallow: /download/windows
Disallow: /download/macos
Disallow: /download/linux
Disallow: /download/android
Disallow: /download/ios
Disallow: /download/openbsd
Disallow: /download/freebsd
Disallow: /download/source
Disallow: /share/

# AI scrapers: we have nothing to hide, but we are not your training corpus.
User-agent: GPTBot
Disallow: /
User-agent: ClaudeBot
Disallow: /
User-agent: Google-Extended
Disallow: /
User-agent: PerplexityBot
Disallow: /
User-agent: anthropic-ai
Disallow: /
User-agent: Bytespider
Disallow: /
User-agent: CCBot
Disallow: /

Sitemap: https://weareone-link.org/sitemap.xml
